name: Kidney Beans

pros.title: one of the cheaper ways to buy useful nutrition
pros.explanation: That matters for real diets, not just theory.

pros.title: does a lot of jobs at once
pros.explanation: Protein, fibre, and meal utility are why legumes stay valuable.

pros.title: filling for the calories
pros.explanation: Legumes usually earn a lot of practical value from satiety.

cons.title: texture is not universally loved
cons.explanation: That can reduce how often people actually use them.

cons.title: can take planning or prep
cons.explanation: That is a small but real friction cost.

cons.title: prep time can still be a barrier
cons.explanation: Dry legumes especially ask more from the cook.

sourceNotes: Expanded dataset sample for FoodRanked pressure-testing.
Values are approximate representative placeholders for category tuning, not a clinical nutrient database.
